p: {"tool":"describe","args":{"source":"drillReports","title":"Daily drill reports","description":"One row per reported activity: what happened on the well each day, over which depth interval, in the driller's own words.","origin":"Volve (Equinor open data) · via skill obtain-volve"}}

{"tool":"describe","args":{"source":"trajectory","title":"Wellbore trajectory","description":"Survey stations along the wellbore: measured depth, inclination, azimuth and true vertical depth.","origin":"Volve (Equinor open data) · via skill obtain-volve"}}

{"tool":"describe","args":{"source":"export","title":"Engineering export","description":"The EDM engineering database flattened: wells, wellbores, BHA assemblies and their components, one row per record with its family.","origin":"Volve (Equinor open data) · via skill obtain-volve"}}

{"tool":"describe","args":{"source":"15-9-F-14","title":"Well log 15/9-F-14","description":"Wireline curves along measured depth: gamma ray, bulk density, neutron porosity and resistivity through the reservoir section.","origin":"Volve (Equinor open data) · via skill obtain-volve"}}

{"tool":"describe","args":{"source":"wellpicks","title":"Formation picks","description":"The geologist's tops: where each formation starts per wellbore, in measured and true vertical depth.","origin":"Volve (Equinor open data) · via skill obtain-volve"}}
{"tool":"think","args":{"text":"I see a rich set of drilling and geological data; I'll start by showing the formation picks to establish our baseline."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"drillReports","field":"<?xml version=1.0 encoding=UTF-8?>","title":"Raw WITSML Report","description":"The original XML data containing daily drilling activities and depth intervals."}}
{"tool":"think","args":{"text":"Annotating the raw WITSML data in the trajectory source to provide a clear human-readable name."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"trajectory","field":"<?xml version=1.0 encoding=UTF-8?>","title":"WITSML Trajectory Data","description":"The raw WITSML XML string containing survey points, including depth, inclination, and azimuth."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"export","field":"<?xml version=1.0 encoding=UTF-8?>","title":"Engineering Data Record","description":"Raw XML data containing well, wellbore, and BHA component information from the EDM database."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"15-9-F-14","field":"~Version ---------------------------------------------------","title":"Log Version Header","description":"Identifies the version of the CWLS log standard used for this well's wireline data."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"wellpicks","field":"Wellbore           Surface            MD      TVD","title":"Formation Marker Data","description":"Contains the well identifier, formation name, and depth measurements (measured and true vertical) for geological markers."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"drillReports","field":"<?xml version=1.0 encoding=UTF-8?>","title":"Raw WITSML Report","description":"The original XML data containing daily drilling activities and depth intervals."}}

{"text":"Document the fields of Formation picks: annotate every field that still lacks a title with a short human title and a one-sentence meaning. If a field's meaning cannot be read from the data, ask me.","ts":1783446303828,"type":"user_message"}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"mdHoleEnd","source":"drillReports","title":"End Hole Depth","description":"The measured depth at which the drilling operation ended for this specific report."}}
{"tool":"think","args":{"text":"Annotating the 'Measured Depth' field in the Formation picks source to provide clear semantics."}}
{"tool":"think","args":{"text":"Annotating the 'Measured Depth' field in the Formation picks source to provide clear semantics."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"wellpicks","field":"MD","title":"Measured Depth","description":"The depth measured along the wellbore from the surface."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"drillReports","field":"comments","title":"Driller's Notes","description":"The driller's narrative of the day's activities, including equipment status and operational details."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"dTimEnd","source":"drillReports","title":"Report End Time","description":"The timestamp marking the end of the reported drilling activity for this specific entry."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"drillReports", "field_name":"dTimStart", "title":"Report Start Time", "description":"The timestamp marking the start of the reported drilling activity for this specific entry."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"drillReports","field":"dTimStart","title":"Report Start Time","description":"The timestamp marking the beginning of the reported drilling activity for this entry."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"mdHoleStart","source":"drillReports","title":"Start Depth","description":"The measured depth at which the drilling operation began for this specific report."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"mdReport","source":"drillReports","title":"Reported Depth","description":"The depth reported in the daily log; it frequently aligns with the end hole depth but is maintained as a separate field for reporting consistency."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"proprietaryCode","source":"drillReports","title":"Operation Type","description":"A code representing the type of operation performed, such as drilling or circulating."}}
{"tool":"think","args":{"text":"Annotating the 'uid' field in the Daily Drill Reports to clarify its role as a unique identifier for each report."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"drillReports","field":"uid","title":"Report ID","description":"A unique identifier for each daily drilling report, typically following a date-based pattern."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"trajectory","field":"md","title":"Measured Depth","description":"The depth measured along the wellbore from the surface."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"azi","source":"trajectory","title":"Azimuth","description":"The horizontal direction of the wellbore measured in degrees from true north."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"trajectory","field":"incl","title":"Inclination","description":"The angle of the wellbore from the vertical, measured in degrees."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"trajectory","field":"tvd","title":"True Vertical Depth","description":"The vertical depth of the wellbore measured from a reference datum, independent of its path along the earth's surface."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"trajectory","field":"uid","title":"Survey Station ID","description":"A unique identifier for each survey point along the wellbore."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"export","field":"family","title":"Equipment Category","description":"The primary classification for the record in the engineering database, such as Well or Assembly."}}
{"tool":"think","args":{"text":"Annotating the 'spud_date' field in the Engineering export to provide clear semantics."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"export","field":"spud_date","title":"Spud Date","description":"The date when the drilling operation officially began."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"description":"The unique identifier for the well in the engineering database.","field":"well_id","source":"export","title":"Well ID"}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"water_depth","source":"export","title":"Water Depth","description":"The vertical distance from the water surface to the seabed."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"well_legal_name","source":"export","title":"Well Legal Name","description":"The official legal designation for the well in regulatory and corporate records."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"export","field":"wellbore_id","title":"Wellbore ID","description":"The unique identifier for a wellbore in the engineering database."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"wellbore_name","source":"export","title":"Wellbore Name","description":"The descriptive name of the wellbore as recorded in the engineering database."}}
{"tool":"think","args":{"text":"Annotating 'Hole Size' in the engineering export to define its role as the borehole diameter for planning."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"hole_size","source":"export","title":"Hole Size","description":"The diameter of the borehole or casing at this section."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"assembly_id","source":"export","title":"Assembly ID","description":"A unique identifier for a specific assembly in the engineering database."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"assembly_name","source":"export","title":"Assembly Name","description":"The descriptive name of the equipment assembly, such as a drill string or casing section."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"md_assembly_base","source":"export","title":"Assembly Base Depth","description":"The measured depth at the bottom of a specific equipment assembly."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"md_assembly_top","source":"export","title":"Assembly Top Depth","description":"The measured depth at the top of a specific equipment assembly."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"component_type","source":"export","title":"Component Type","description":"The classification of the equipment component, such as 'Pipe', 'Tool', or 'BHA'."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"description":"A unique identifier for an equipment component in the engineering database.","field":"component_id","source":"export","title":"Component ID"}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"length","source":"export","title":"Component Length","description":"The length of the equipment component or casing section."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"outer_diameter","source":"export","title":"Outer Diameter","description":"The external diameter of the pipe or casing section."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"description":"The elevation of the reference datum used for depth calculations.","field":"datum_elevation","source":"export","title":"Datum Elevation"}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"description":"The unique identifier for the reference datum used in depth calculations.","field":"datum_id","source":"export","title":"Datum ID"}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"datum_name","source":"export","title":"Datum Name","description":"The descriptive name of the reference datum used for depth calculations."}}
{"tool":"annotate","args":{"field":"DEPT","source":"15-9-F-14","title":"Measured Depth","description":"The depth measured along the wellbore from the surface."}}

{"tool":"annotate","args":{"source":"15-9-F-14","field":"GR","title":"Gamma Ray","description":"Measures the natural radioactivity of the formation, primarily used to identify clay and shale content."}}
